svg.title: Where creator-economy ad payments go (estimated)
svg.desc: Where creator-economy ad payments go (estimated). Source: BCG From Content to Commerce: Mapping India's Creator Economy; CreatorIQ State of Creator Compensation 2026. Estimated percentile bands derived from reported top-1% and top-10% shares; not a full distribution and not India-specific.
